meaning: n.[生化]结合珠蛋白,触珠蛋白
examples: There are several versions of the haptoglobin gene.
In intravascular hemolytic anemia, more RBC are destroyed in the circulation (hemoglobinemia) than can be bound to haptoglobin.
Based on our observations, the subunit structures of haptoglobin protein conjugates are largely consistent with the known model.
